tldr.title: DeepSeek V4 Pro beats GPT-5.5 Pro on precision
tldr.author: yogthos
bullets: The benchmark results show DeepSeek V4 Pro achieving higher accuracy than OpenAI's GPT-5.5 Pro in complex reasoning and logic tasks.
This performance milestone highlights the efficiency of DeepSeek's architectural scaling, particularly in minimizing hallucinations compared to proprietary models.
Enterprise AI architects should evaluate DeepSeek's latest API for high-precision workflows like code generation and structured data extraction.

tldr.title: What are you doing this week?
tldr.author: caius
bullets: Lobsters developers share hands-on updates, highlighting real-world applications of Rust, Go, Nix, and custom systems-level programming.
Weekly community threads offer peer review and troubleshooting insights for personal side projects, self-hosted infrastructure, and tool development.
The discussion promotes sustainable engineering practices, balancing intense sprint deliverables with scheduled downtime to prevent burnout.

tldr.title: Michigan politicians want to ban Chinese-badged cars from even visiting the US
tldr.author: Jonathan M. Gitlin
bullets: The latest bill would ban day trips from Canada or Mexico in Chinese cars.
